sql_array: CREATE TABLE mysql_test(id UInt64, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO FUNCTION mysql('localhost:3306', 'test', 'test', 'bayonet', '123', 0, 'UPDATE id = id + 1') VALUES (1, 'test_name');
UPDATE mysql_test SET name = 'updated_name' WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO mysql_test SELECT * FROM mysql('localhost:3306', 'test', 'test', 'bayonet', '123') WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM mysql_test);
